description: The unique resonance through which a being expresses their inner state. It is the carrier of tone and word, understood as a sacred extension of one's presence into the world.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'ni' (a state of being, presence) and 'a' (openness). The word's structure literally means 'the openness of one's being.' The vowel hiatus 'i.a' creates a sound that feels like it is emanating from a core presence and opening out into the world.
